/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MemoryGame.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MemoryGame.dir/main.cpp.o -o MemoryGame  -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
